ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recipe */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the recipe */,
  "calories" REAL /* Calories per serving */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content per serving */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content per serving */,
  "sodium" REAL /* Sodium content per serving */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the recipe */,
  "prep_time" INTEGER /* Preparation time in minutes */,
  "cook_time" INTEGER /* Cooking time in minutes */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time (prep + cook) in minutes */,
  "servings" INTEGER /* Number of servings the recipe makes */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipe was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recipe was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user who created the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for nutritional info entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe this info pertains to */,
  "blue_cheese" INTEGER /* Indicates if blue cheese is used (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "boil" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe requires boiling (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "bread" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is bread-based (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "breakfast" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a breakfast item (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "brown_rice" INTEGER /* Indicates if brown rice is an ingredient (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "brunch" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is intended for brunch (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Fiber content per serving */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Sugar content per serving */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Cholesterol content per serving */,
  "vitamin_a" REAL /* Vitamin A content per serving */,
  "vitamin_c" REAL /* Vitamin C content per serving */,
  "calcium" REAL /* Calcium content per serving */,
  "iron" REAL /* Iron content per serving */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the nutritional info was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the nutritional info was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_info_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dietary_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for dietary restriction entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe this restriction pertains to */,
  "dairy_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is dairy free (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "low_carb" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is low carb (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is vegetarian (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "low_fat" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is low fat (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "low_sodium" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is low sodium (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "low_sugar" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is low in sugar (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is gluten-free (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "nut_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is nut-free (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "sugar_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is sugar-free (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is vegan (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "paleo" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is paleo (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "kosher" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is kosher (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "halal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is halal (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dietary restriction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dietary restriction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dietary_restrictions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_types" (
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for meal type entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe this meal type pertains to */,
  "breakfast" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a breakfast item (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "lunch" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a lunch item (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "dinner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a dinner item (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "brunch" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a brunch item (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "snack" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a snack (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "appetizer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is an appetizer (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "main_course" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a main course (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "dessert" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a dessert (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "beverage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is a beverage (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meal type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meal type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_types_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe the ingredient belongs to */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the ingredient (e.g., grams, cups) */,
  "calories_per_100g" REAL /* Calories per 100 grams of the ingredient */,
  "protein_per_100g" REAL /* Protein content per 100 grams of the ingredient */,
  "fat_per_100g" REAL /* Fat content per 100 grams of the ingredient */,
  "sodium_per_100g" REAL /* Sodium content per 100 grams of the ingredient */,
  "fiber_per_100g" REAL /* Fiber content per 100 grams of the ingredient */,
  "sugar_per_100g" REAL /* Sugar content per 100 grams of the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingredient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., chef, nutritionist, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the recipe */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ratings_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
